title: Line Chart
description: An interactive line chart component for visualizing trends, time series data, and continuous data with smooth animations, interactive tooltips, and customizable styling.

showcase.title: Line Chart Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive line chart demonstrating trends and data visualization

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple line chart with revenue and expenses data

sections.title: Axis Configuration
sections.description: Line chart with custom axis labels and grid configuration

sections.title: Animation Effects
sections.description: Line chart with custom animation duration and easing

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Line chart with custom styling options and visual appearance

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Line chart with click events, tooltips, and interactive crosshair

sections.title: Size Variations
sections.description: Line charts in different sizes for various use cases

sections.title: Multi-Series Data
sections.description: Line chart with multiple data series and different device usage patterns

types.title: AXLineChartComponent
types.description: Line Chart Component - Interactive line chart for rendering data as lines with interactive hover effects and animations

props.name: data
props.description: Chart data input - supports both single series and array of series

events.name: pointClick
events.description: Emitted when a data point is clicked

methods.name: createChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Create and render the line chart
 */
createChart(): void

methods.name: updateChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Update the chart with new data
 */
updateChart(): void

methods.name: cleanupChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Clean up chart resources
 */
cleanupChart(): void

methods.name: highlightSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Highlights a specific segment by ID
 * @param id The segment ID to highlight, or null to clear highlight
 */
highlightSegment(id: string | null): void

methods.name: toggleSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles visibility of a segment by ID
 * @param id Segment ID to toggle
 * @returns New visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)
 */
toggleSegment(id: string): boolean

methods.name: getLegendItems
methods.content:
/**
 * Returns the data items for the legend
 * @implements AXChartLegendCompatible
 */
getLegendItems(): AXChartLegendItem[]

tokens.name: --ax-comp-line-chart-labels-color
tokens.description: Color for axis labels. Applied with 0.7 opacity where needed

tokens.name: --ax-comp-line-chart-axis-color
tokens.description: Color for X/Y axis lines. Applied with 0.2 opacity

tokens.name: --ax-comp-line-chart-grid-lines-color
tokens.description: Color for grid lines. Applied with 0.2 opacity

tokens.name: --ax-comp-line-chart-bg-color
tokens.description: Background color for the chart area

tokens.name: --ax-comp-line-chart-text-color
tokens.description: Color for text elements like labels and no data message

types.title: AX_LINE_CHART_CONFIG
types.description: Default configuration token providing effective AXLineChartOption values

props.name: showVerticalGrid
props.description: Whether to show vertical grid lines

props.name: yAxisStartsAtZero
props.description: Whether Y axis should start at zero

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: lineWidth
props.description: Width of the line in pixels

props.name: pointRadius
props.description: Radius of data points in pixels

props.name: smoothLine
props.description: Whether to use smooth curves for lines

props.name: fillArea
props.description: Whether to fill area under the line

props.name: showCrosshair
props.description: Whether to show crosshair on hover

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in ms
